description: Rule for sourcing photos from followed actors and/or hashtags into gallery feed or albums.

main.description: Declares social sources (follow graph, explicit DIDs, hashtags) for gallery feed or album population.

targetScope.description: ATPix — gallery (social feed) or album (membership seeding).

targetAlbumUri.description: ATPix — required when targetScope is album; target album AT URI.

useFollowGraph.description: ATPix — when true, resolve actors via app.bsky.graph.getFollows.

followedActors.description: schema:follows (conceptual) — explicit DID allow-list; unioned with follow graph when useFollowGraph is true.

hashtags.description: dc:subject — normalized hashtags (no #); matched against photo.keywords.

includeOwnPhotos.description: ATPix — include photos authored by the rule owner.

active.description: ATPix — inactive rules are ignored by listFeedPhotos.
